cyb3rdan.com Another infosec blog

OSCP

01 Jul 2019

Well it’s been a while and even though I mentioned in my first post that I would update here during my OSCP journey, study as well as life in general got in the way; so this is going to be a big update. Thankfully though, all that time spent away was well worth it since I did manage to pass the exam on the first attempt, after managing to get the flags on all lab machines. This was definitely one of the most amazing experiences of my life and I could not recommend it more for anyone else that is thinking about starting their OSCP journey.

Hack the Box - Active

13 Dec 2018

First Post

16 Nov 2018

Creating a blog is something I’ve been wanting to do for a while now, but there have been so many more important things going on in my life that meant I just never got around to it.

In terms of content, I have been focusing quite a lot on Hack The Box lately, and I will likely start with some walkthroughs once I get around to making my notes more complete.
